mapper.sql: select id, master_article_id, game_id, relation_source, relation_type, display_order, confidence_score, ai_platform_id, ai_reasoning, ai_metadata, review_status, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, review_notes, is_featured, click_count, last_used_at, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from gb_master_article_games

select mag.id, mag.master_article_id, mag.game_id, g.name as game_name, mag.relation_source, mag.relation_type, mag.display_order, mag.confidence_score, mag.ai_platform_id, mag.ai_reasoning, mag.ai_metadata, mag.review_status, mag.reviewed_by, mag.reviewed_at, mag.review_notes, mag.is_featured, mag.click_count, mag.last_used_at, mag.del_flag, mag.create_by, mag.create_time, mag.update_by, mag.update_time, mag.remark from gb_master_article_games mag left join gb_games g on mag.game_id = g.id
mapper.select: where mag.master_article_id = #{masterArticleId} and mag.del_flag = '0' order by mag.display_order asc, mag.confidence_score desc, mag.create_time desc
select count(1) from gb_master_article_games where master_article_id = #{masterArticleId} and game_id = #{gameId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert:
insert into gb_master_article_games
master_article_id, game_id, relation_source, relation_type, display_order, confidence_score, ai_platform_id, ai_reasoning, ai_metadata, review_status, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, review_notes, is_featured, click_count, last_used_at, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark,
#{masterArticleId}, #{gameId}, #{relationSource}, #{relationType}, #{displayOrder}, #{confidenceScore}, #{aiPlatformId}, #{aiReasoning}, #{aiMetadata}, #{reviewStatus}, #{reviewedBy}, #{reviewedAt}, #{reviewNotes}, #{isFeatured}, #{clickCount}, #{lastUsedAt}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark},

insert into gb_master_article_games (master_article_id, game_id, relation_source, relation_type, display_order, confidence_score, ai_platform_id, ai_reasoning, ai_metadata, review_status, is_featured, click_count, del_flag, create_by, create_time) values
(#{item.masterArticleId}, #{item.gameId}, #{item.relationSource}, #{item.relationType}, #{item.displayOrder}, #{item.confidenceScore}, #{item.aiPlatformId}, #{item.aiReasoning}, #{item.aiMetadata}, #{item.reviewStatus}, #{item.isFeatured}, #{item.clickCount}, #{item.delFlag}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime})
mapper.delete: update gb_master_article_games set del_flag = '2' where id = #{id}

update gb_master_article_games set del_flag = '2' where id in
#{id}
update gb_master_article_games set del_flag = '2' where master_article_id = #{masterArticleId}
